title: Snapchat
html: Stub. The disappearing-photo social-media app. Recurs across Yahir's 2019 high-school notes as both a daily-use surface (photo memories triggering déjà vu in 2019 09 23 deja vu eugene springfield) and a product-design reference (the "snap map app" concept logged in 2019 07 22 run in morning). The Snap Map feature also surfaces later in 2022 as a real-world adjacency-spotting tool.
